headline: Is AT&T (T) Still Undervalued As Fiber Strength Offsets Churn?
summary: AT&T stock has delivered a strong 51.0% gain over the past three years, yet the recent slide in the share price and a high overall value score suggest the market may still be pricing it below what the fundamentals imply. Over the last three years, AT&T has returned 51.0%, which puts the recent weak stretch in context as a pullback after a longer period of positive performance. The push into fiber and converged connectivity, highlighted by AT&T Fiber’s recent performance awards, can support...
